channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Some of our favorite art TVs are more than 40 percent off this weekend
item.description: Art TVs aren’t exactly known for being affordable, which is why Woot’s latest sale is notable. Now through June 26th, the retailer is discounting Samsung’s 2025 Frame TV and Hisense’s 2025 CanvasTV. The 65-inch CanvasTV is down to $779.99 ($520 off) — its best price of the year — while Samsung’s like-minded Frame TV is […]

item.title: La CNIL s’alarme des lunettes connectées, Meta en rajoute avec un collier IA
item.description: Alors que la CNIL alerte contre les lunettes connectées, Meta annonce un pendentif capable d'enregistrer vos conversations.

item.title: I wasn't convinced that the Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike would be that special, but I was wrong: this is a revolution for gaming mice
item.description: The Logitech G Pro X2 Superstrike is an extremely good gaming mouse with one extremely clever feature that sets it apart from the competition.

item.title: The groupthink boom: what three top VCs really think about the AI frenzy
item.description: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A [offer]," said one, half-kiddingly.

item.title: Apple could be about to launch a Spotify-like free tier, but users are worried there might be a major downside
item.description: Apple Music might be preparing to let users listen for free, but there might be big limitations and adverts attached.

item.title: Cette startup fait le ménage gratuitement, mais filme l’intérieur de votre maison pour entraîner ses robots
item.description: Shift envoie des agents faire le ménage chez vous, gratuitement. La contrepartie : chaque geste est filmé pour entraîner les robots qui feront le même travail demain. Sans les agents.

item.title: Listen to the new Steam Controller buzz to the tune of Doom
item.description: You may have heard that Valve's new Steam Controller can ring like a telephone or do the Wilhelm scream. But did you know it can sing songs, too? Let me show you. Here's the new Steam Controller performing the "Ground Theme" from Super Mario Bros. 2: Here is "Still Alive" from Portal - fitting for […]

item.title: J’ai testé une alternative (vraiment) pas chère aux Ray-Ban Meta, ça vaut le coup ou pas ?
item.description: Les Ray-Ban Meta ont insufflé une tendance et les lunettes connectées sont clairement devenues à la mode, à tel point que certains constructeurs reprennent la recette du succès avec des tarifs très agressifs, à l'image de Blackview avec son modèle BV100 que j'ai testé et surtout acheté pour à peine 50 euros en promo. Verdict ?

item.title: Vie privée : en Italie, ces logiciels espions low cost sont massivement utilisés par la police
item.description: En Italie, les enquêteurs utilisent très fréquemment des logiciels espions peu onéreux, développés par plusieurs entreprises locales. Ces outils seraient régulièrement utilisés par les forces de l'ordre au mépris des droits fondamentaux pourtant protégés par le droit européen, selon European Digital Rights (EDRi), qui demande à la Commission européenne de réagir....

item.title: Pebblebee’s Halo watches my back and my belongings
item.description: I live in a part of Los Angeles where I feel safer bringing pepper spray on walks. The problem is, I don't always remember to bring it with me, and it's not legal to carry it everywhere I go. Pebblebee's $59.99 Halo Bluetooth tracker surprised me by being a suitable replacement because it doubles as […]

item.title: The Arduboy FX-C is an excellent time killer you might forget you’re carrying
item.description: As handheld consoles continue to grow and push the limits of what you can actually hold in your hands, the Arduboy FX-C comes in a refreshingly pocketable package. It manages to squeeze the best features of past models and some welcome upgrades into a handheld that’s still no larger or thicker than a few credit […]

item.title: There's a sneaky way to watch Champions League final 2026 for FREE — stream Arsenal vs PSG
item.description: We've found a sneaky way to stream the 2026 Champions League final for free from anywhere in the world.

item.title: 5 Fitness Trackers That Don't Lock Core Features Behind a Monthly Subscription
item.description: The Fitbit Air isn't the only Whoop alternative that you can buy without a subscription.

item.title: Mistral renomme Le Chat en Vibe : adieu le clin d’œil français
item.description: Mistral AI renomme son chatbot Le Chat en Vibe, avec trois modes, Chat, Work, Code, et une ambition assumée : jouer dans la même cour que ChatGPT, Gemini et Claude.
